title: Web-to-Cloud: Attack Path Link Analysis
description: Link analysis groups all events carrying the web-to-cloud Trace ID or C2/object-storage pivots into a single path. Use this widget to drill from WAF entry to app host, network egress, firewall alert, and OCI Audit object access.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration') | link span = 15minute 'Trace ID', 'Log Source' | eventstats max(Count) as PeakEvents, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Log Source') as Sources

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Peak Path</title-text><title-text>Evidence</title-text><title-text>Traces</title-text><title-text>Log Sources</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Trace the attack path from entry point through exfiltration.
Which stage has the strongest evidence and which needs more investigation?

falsepositives: Red team replay of the demo chain
